case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CARLOS ANDREW BRENNER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS ANDREW BRENNER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,001.22 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $128.32 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED DEC-23-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $862.63 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, CARLOS ANDREW
